description: Letter fragment in Judaeo-Arabic. Faded and damaged. Dating: 11th or 12th century. The sender may be named Abū l-F[...]. Unclear if any of the content is salvageable. Mentions "goods" (ḥawāʾij). Might join with ENA NS 85.1296 (PGPID 14628).
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
